primary.usage: Hover states on navigation links and interactive elements; accent green used for CTAs

secondary.usage: Spacer borders, dark accents, section dividers (border-bottom: 2pt solid #2A2A2A)

main.usage: Page background. Site uses white as the base body background with dark overlays only on hero banner. No CSS rule sets body background to a dark color; default white applies.
main.cssEvidence: No explicit body { background-color } rule found in site CSS. Default browser white (#FFFFFF) applies. The only dark areas are the banner overlay (rgba(0,0,0,0.7)) and footer.

alternate.usage: Alternating content sections, card backgrounds for menu items

card.usage: Menu item cards and food image wrappers

heroBanner.usage: Dark overlay on hero banner image (linear-gradient with background-image)

heading.usage: Navigation links and primary heading text (rgb(33, 37, 41) from nav styling)

body.usage: Body text, descriptions, menu item details

light.usage: Text on dark backgrounds - hero banner, footer, social media section

link.usage: Navigation links default to dark, hover to green

accent.usage: Warm gold accent used in logo and Mexican-themed decorative elements. Inferred from logo color palette on CloudFront-hosted brand mark.

gradients.usage: Hero banner overlay - dark scrim over food photography

shadows.usage: Site uses a flat design approach with minimal shadow. Elevation conveyed through background color contrast rather than box-shadow.

colorPalette.overallTheme: warm-earthy — Light base with warm earthy accents. The green hover state and gold logo elements evoke fresh ingredients and Mexican warmth. Dark elements are limited to the hero overlay and footer, not a site-wide dark theme.

headingFont.style: bold modern - clean geometric sans-serif for headings
headingFont.evidence: Identified from menu/ordering page CSS. Montserrat used for headings and navigation.

bodyFont.style: clean readable - neutral body text for menus and descriptions
bodyFont.evidence: Identified from menu/ordering page CSS. Roboto used for body text and menu item descriptions.

scale.note: Site uses pt units throughout rather than rem/em, suggesting a custom or template-based platform

hero.ctaStyle: no prominent CTA button in hero - scroll-based discovery

messagingPatterns.headlines: Simple and direct - 'Welcome to Mexico Lindo Express', 'Mexican Restaurant'
messagingPatterns.descriptions: Feature-focused with ingredient lists - 'Traditional Braised Beef Tacos, topped with Cilantro, Onion, Cheese, Lime and Salsa'

instagram.emojiUsage: moderate - food and Mexican flag emojis
sampleCaptions: Note: Instagram content could not be fully scraped due to platform restrictions. Profile exists at @mexicolindoex with active posting.

commonPraise: Authentic Mexican food - not gringo quality
Best birria tacos in the GTA
Generous portions with double corn tortillas
Feels like a culinary trip to Mexico

verbatimReviews.quote: Finally, an authentic Mexican gem that feels like a culinary trip to Mexico! Mexico Lindo is everything I've been searching for - owned and passionately run by a Mexican chef who truly honors the flavors of their homeland. No watered-down imitations here; every bite bursts with the vibrant, authentic taste I fell in love with during my travels.
Worth the drive, if you don't live close by, for the BEST birria tacos in the GTA.
Beef burrito was HUGE and very juicy and filling. Churros was so good that no words can describe how amazing this is!
I've found my new go-to taco spot in Scarborough - the staff are friendly, the food is delicious, and the atmosphere is cozy!
Seriously the best mexican food I've found in Toronto!
Absolute perfection. The tender, smoky meats, fresh handmade tortillas, and zesty salsas transported me straight back to the streets of Guadalajara.
The food was amazingly tasty. Authentic, fresh and reliable every time.
In short: great food, amazing prices, and friendly staff.

contentStrategy.valueProposition: Authentic Mexican street food made by a Mexican chef, bringing the real flavors of Mexico to Scarborough at honest prices
keyMessages: Authentic Mexican cuisine - owned and run by a Mexican chef
Famous birria tacos and handmade tortillas
Convenient takeout with limited cozy dine-in

imageStrategy.primarySubjects: food close-ups - tacos, burritos, plated combos
imageStrategy.mood: warm and appetizing - vibrant food photography
imageStrategy.composition: close-ups of dishes with visible ingredients and garnishes

specials: BOGO 50% off tacos on Wednesdays and Fridays
Family Fiesta Deals: Taco Tray (30 tacos) $150, Nachos Platter $75
BOGO offers on Uber Eats for Birria Tacos, Enchiladas, and Street Burritos

signatureDishes.name: Tacos de Birria
signatureDishes.description: Traditional braised beef tacos with cilantro, onion, cheese, lime, salsa and consomme (5 tacos)

signatureDishes.name: Tacos de Carne Asada
signatureDishes.description: Perfectly seasoned and grilled steak on soft corn tortillas

signatureDishes.name: Mexican Combo
signatureDishes.description: Chicken enchilada in ranchero sauce with melted cheese, paired with beef chimichanga

peopleResearchNotes: Extensive search conducted across the website (homepage, menu/ordering page), Instagram (@mexicolindoex), Facebook page, Yelp, Google reviews, Corner.inc, GoToEat, and Uber Eats listings. No owner, chef, or staff member is named on any public-facing platform. All references describe 'a Mexican chef' or 'friendly staff' without specific names. The restaurant has no About/Team page (404). Instagram profile could not be fully scraped due to platform restrictions. The people[] array contains the unnamed owner/chef as a placeholder entry.

archetype.rationale: Mexico Lindo Express is a neighborhood Mexican restaurant where foot traffic, takeout convenience, and local identity are primary drivers. The website leads with atmosphere imagery and prominently displays hours and address. Menu/food is the conversion driver, but the location-first archetype fits because customers describe it as a hidden gem worth the drive, and the business identity is deeply tied to its Birchmount Road Scarborough location.

businessInfo.name: Mexico Lindo Express
amenities: Delivery via Uber Eats and SkipTheDishes
Credit/debit cards and NFC mobile payments accepted
